title: Conflicting provisions
doc_html:
§2042.  Conflicting provisions

R.S. 33:2021 through R.S. 33:2041 do not repeal special laws which establish benefits or relief funds for firemen in any municipality.
doc_text:
§2042.  Conflicting provisions
R.S. 33:2021 through R.S. 33:2041 do not repeal special laws which establish benefits or relief funds for firemen in any municipality.
